intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把海峡路线、瓶中纸条、十个月后的回信、regular communication 和 post office 的 practical ending 读出来。

sentences.text: My daughter, Jane, never dreamed of receiving a letter from a girl of her own age in Holland.
sentences.focus_zh: never dreamed of receiving 是从没想过会收到；of her own age 是和她同龄；Holland 在这课里指荷兰。

sentences.text: Last year, we were travelling across the Channel and Jane put a piece of paper with her name and address on it into a bottle.
sentences.focus_zh: travelling across the Channel 是横渡英吉利海峡；name and address 是能收到信的姓名和地址。

sentences.text: She threw the bottle into the sea.
sentences.focus_zh: threw 是 throw 的过去式；这里是旧故事里的情节，不是今天要模仿的行为。

sentences.text: She never thought of it again, but ten months later, she received a letter from a girl in Holland.
sentences.focus_zh: never thought of it again 是再也没想起；ten months later 要读出等待很久后的惊喜。

sentences.text: Both girls write to each other regularly now.
sentences.focus_zh: write to each other 是互相写信；regularly 是有规律地、稳定地联系。

sentences.text: However, they have decided to use the post office.
sentences.focus_zh: However 后面出现 practical turn；decided to use the post office 是决定用更可靠的寄信方式。

sentences.text: Letters will cost a little more, but they will certainly travel faster.
sentences.focus_zh: a little more 是稍微多一点；travel faster 是到得更快，结尾落在更可靠的通信方式上。
